summary: First-finish smoke test of PKGT single-page marketing site. Backend: /api/health, /api/company/stats, /api/contact (POST valid, POST invalid 400, GET list) all return correct data. Frontend: All 11 sections render with data-testid; hero shows company name in subtext + 4 correct stat blocks (35+, ₹60 Cr+, 13, 12+); Team has exactly 6 cards starting with 'Eng. Abhishek Kumar Gupta'; 'Abhilash Gupta' is NOT present anywhere in DOM (case-insensitive scan); all 13 projects render by default; National Highway filter narrows to 5 rows correctly; Turnover recharts chart renders with 5 bars and '16.30' appears; Contact form valid submission fires sonner success toast 'Enquiry received. Our project team will be in touch shortly.'
passed: POST /api/contact with empty payload -> 400 with 'Name, email and message are required'
All 11 sections present (hero, about, sectors, projects, clients, research, machinery, turnover, team, contact, footer)
Company name 'M/s Pramod Kumar Gupta Thekedar' present in Hero subtext
Team: 6 cards, first = 'Eng. Abhishek Kumar Gupta'
'Abhilash Gupta' NOT present in DOM (HARD requirement met)
project-filter-national-highway click narrows list to 5 rows (P-09..P-13)
turnover-chart present with 5 recharts bars; '16.30' visible
Contact form valid submission -> sonner toast success + POST /api/contact 200

failed.issue: Submitting Contact form with empty fields shows NO validation toast. Inputs have no 'required' attribute either; clicking submit produces neither native browser validation nor a sonner error toast. Only silent no-op observed.
failed.evidence: Playwright: toast list empty after empty submit; name input 'required' attribute = '' (not set). Screenshot shows no error/toast/native tooltip.

action_items: Optional: Add client-side validation in Contact.jsx to trigger a sonner error toast (e.g. toast.error('Please fill name, email and message')) when required fields are empty, matching the PRD requirement 'submitting with empty fields shows a validation toast'.
